summary: Completed frontend testing of iteration 5 changes: 1) Login redirect fix VERIFIED - React Router handles redirect correctly to /app/dashboard, 2) PMSModule refactoring VERIFIED - BookingDialog and Guest360Dialog extracted successfully, PMS page loads with all tabs, 3) i18n string conversion VERIFIED - Turkish translations display correctly (Ön Büro, Odalar, Misafirler, Rezervasyonlar, Raporlar). Fixed 4 bugs found in Guest360Dialog.js during code review.

FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing guestTag/setGuestTag state - added useState
FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing guestNote/setGuestNote state - added useState
FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing addGuestTag/addGuestNote functions - added implementations
FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing Crown icon import from lucide-react - added
FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing recharts imports (ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell, Tooltip) - added
FIXED: Guest360Dialog.js was missing CardDescription import - added
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 tasks from iteration 5 verified working: 1) Login redirect uses React Router (no more window.location.href), 2) PMSModule refactored successfully with BookingDialog and Guest360Dialog extracted, 3) i18n Turkish translations showing correctly. Guest360Dialog had missing imports/state which were fixed during this iteration.
